event.title: Defense Details

about.title: Intelligence, quietly at work
about.p1: Artificial intelligence has slipped out of the research lab and into the rhythm of ordinary life — suggesting the next song, translating a stranger's message, catching an illness before we feel it. Its quietest role may also be its most important: keeping the flow of goods that modern life depends on moving smoothly.
about.p2: In logistics, every lost minute is a late delivery, every extra kilometer is fuel burned, every empty shelf is a patient without medicine. IntelliPharma applies reinforcement learning to exactly this problem — planning pharmacy visit routes that adapt in real time to urgent orders, closed pharmacies, and shifting traffic. The same engine extends to any multi-stop field operation: distribution, last-mile delivery, home services, inspections.

team.title: The Team
